tab.label: COMPANY Chart Styles

button.label: Column Chart
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Column with Blue Ramp
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Stacked Column
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Stacked Column with Blue Ramp
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Line Chart
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Line with Markers
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Bar Chart
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Bar with Blue Ramp
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Stacked Bar
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Stacked Bar with Blue Ramp
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Area Chart
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Area with Blue Ramp
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Scatterplot
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Pie Chart
button.supertip: Style a chart following the COMPANY standards

button.label: Slope Chart
button.supertip: Use this button to create a Slope Chart in COMPANY style. This option will prompt you for a number of data series you wish to plot and then generate a new worksheet with placeholder data for the Slope Chart. You can then insert your own data into the worksheet.

button.label: Dot Plot
button.supertip: Use this button to create a Dot Plot in COMPANY style. This option will prompt you for a number of data series you wish to plot and then generate a new worksheet with placeholder data for the Dot Plot. You can then insert your own data into the worksheet.
Ocean fill color
Coral fill color
Sky fill color
Pine fill color
Gold fill color
Rust fill color
Lavender fill color
Silver fill color
White fill color

tab.group: <button id="InvertRamp" image="i_menu_invert" size="normal" supertip="Invert ramp colour order" onAction="InvertRamp_onAction"

button.label: Reset to Grey
button.supertip: Reset all chartobjects to grey.

button.label: Label Last Point
button.supertip: Add series names to the last point on the graph.

button.label: Toggle Gridlines
button.supertip: Cycle gridlines on the selected chart: none → horizontal → vertical → both.

button.label: Invert Ramp
button.supertip: Reverse the fill colour order across all chart series.

button.label: Remove Legend
button.supertip: Remove the chart legend and resize the plot area to standard web dimensions.

button.label: Chart Export
button.supertip: Export chart as PNG, GIF, JPG, BMP, SVG, or PDF. Note that this will *not* warn you to overwrite an existing file.

button.label: Notes
button.supertip: Various notes and explanations about this Excel add-in.
